Royal Quest
Knight of Love Amulet

Once in a while, the unit removes all burning and incineration effects from themself and all allies in a small radius around the unit. Also, the amulet wearer and the targeted allies become immune to those effects for 5 sec. The unit also casts stiffness on 2 nearby enemies. The attack speed of stiff units is reduced by 30% for 5 sec. Also during this time, stiff enemies take 64000 magic damage every 1 sec. When the stiffness wears off, they are frozen for 2 sec. During this time, the frozen unit can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
